answer_en:
External Oblique m.
Lateral flexion and contralateral rotation of the trunk at the thoracic and lumbar spine
Tenses the anterior wall and assists in compressing the contents of the abdomen (required during straining)

details: Lateral flexion and contralateral rotation of the trunk at the thoracic and lumbar spine
Tenses the anterior wall and assists in compressing the contents of the abdomen (required during straining)

title: Anterior View of Abdominal Wall
subtitle: (Anterior Rectus Sheath Removed on Right Side)
